item.title: Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth, should be fired and jailed for lying to Congress and dereliction of duty
item.description:
Part one where Pass the Bottle Pete shows just how embarrassingly unqualified he is for the position of Secretary of State.
This is shameful. Possibly the only person more unqualified for their military position is Donald "bone Spurs" Trump. They should both be stripped of their positions and tried in a military tribunal for dereliction of duty.
item.dc:creator: RichardPenne

item.title: #MilitaryOffOurStreets

item.title: Indonesian modern Dangdut
item.description: This kind of music is normally played in social gatherings such as wedding in rural Indonesian areas. This girl elevate it with her talent and skill to a new level. Her insta: https://www.instagram.com/arindiputry_?igsh=MTVtOW8xcm1rbmhvMg== Wow! My first 'Most Viral'! If you like this, please visit the girl's insta and support her. The purpose of this particular Dangdut music from Indonesia is to have it's listener have fun. Are you having fun?
item.dc:creator: SolidAqua

item.title: Can finally post the entirety of this banger
item.dc:creator: DrForester

item.title: British Construction Workers Discovering a 2nd Century Roman Mosaic
item.description: This happened in 2022, I just hadn't seen this photo before and the juxtaposition of Europe's tallest skyscraper with a 2000 year old dining room was compelling.
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: I wonder how veterans feel about this?
item.description: Source: https://bsky.app/profile/newseye.bsky.social/post/3lrjgrrtn6c2e Not Rant I briefly lived in a part of the world that had very little separation between police and armed forces, and that is one of the reasons why I don’t live there anymore. There is very little I can say here without divulging personal information. A rubicon has been crossed, there is no going back from this point. I feel terrible for the people of Los Angeles, they deserve better than this. This is a shameful day for the country, even by its own low standards.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Been on a weight loss journey watch me loose 65lbs
item.description: Sorry for the selfies I started my mid 20s at 240 lbs now at 35 Im down to 175. Sorry about loose and lose ??
